URL: https://gsbuildersgroup.com/
# Golden State Builders Group
> A full-service residential and commercial construction and remodeling company in Walnut Creek, CA, providing interior and exterior renovations, restoration, inspections, and design-build solutions.
> This file lists LLM-ready summaries of our pages, including short Q&A for context.

URL: https://gsbuildersgroup.com/interior-contracting-services/
## Interior Contractor 
- Interior Contractor in Walnut Creek, CA. Providing interior contracting services, such as design, remodeling, finishes, and systems upgrades to improve comfort, functionality, and aesthetics inside homes.
- **Q:** What does interior contracting include?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group’s interior contracting includes services such as painting, flooring, refinishing, and full remodeling.
- **Q:** What service helps with indoor climate and air quality?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group offers HVAC services to improve energy performance and indoor air quality.

URL: https://gsbuildersgroup.com/architecture-plans/
## Architectural Design Services 
- Architectural Design Services in Walnut Creek, CA. Creating detailed, functional, and code‑compliant architectural plans and design services for residential and commercial projects.
- **Q:** What do architectural planning teams do?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group’s architectural planning team helps clients transform their vision into buildable, code‑compliant architectural plans.
- **Q:** What technology is used to help clients visualize designs?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group uses 3D modeling and visualization tools to help clients see and refine their project before construction begins.
- **Q:** What kinds of buildings can companies design plans for?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group offers architectural plan services for single‑family homes, custom remodels, offices, and mixed‑use developments.

URL: https://gsbuildersgroup.com/bathroom-remodel/
## Bathroom Remodeling 
- Bathroom Remodeling in Walnut Creek, CA. Designing and installing custom bathroom remodels that combine stylish finishes, improved layouts, and high‑quality fixtures to create more functional and visually appealing bathrooms for homeowners.
- **Q:** What elements are included in bathroom remodels?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group’s bathroom remodels include premium finishes, updated fixtures, and expert craftsmanship to elevate comfort and style.
- **Q:** How to approach a bathroom design?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group works with clients to create customized bathroom remodels that reflect their vision and preferences.

URL: https://gsbuildersgroup.com/flood-fire-restoration/
## Fire & Water Restoration Services 
- Fire & Water Restoration Services in Walnut Creek, CA. Offering professional flood and fire restoration services to repair, restore, and improve properties damaged by water or fire, including fireproofing and fire‑resistant upgrades.
- **Q:** What types of restoration are handled for homes affected by disasters?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group restores properties damaged by floods or fires, returning them to safe and functional condition.
- **Q:** What safety upgrade services are offered to reduce fire risk?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group installs fire‑resistant materials and fireproofing solutions to enhance home safety and compliance.
- **Q:** Where are the flood and fire restoration services provided?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group provides these restoration services to residential and commercial properties in and around Walnut Creek, CA, and nearby Bay Area locations.

URL: https://gsbuildersgroup.com/hvac/
## HVAC Services 
- HVAC Services in Walnut Creek, CA. Offering HVAC (heating, ventilation, and air conditioning) services, such as system design, installation, repair, preventive maintenance, and indoor air quality solutions, for residential and commercial properties.
- **Q:** What is included in the HVAC services?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group offers HVAC system design, installation, repair, preventive maintenance, and indoor air quality solutions.
- **Q:** How to improve indoor air quality?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group enhances indoor air quality with advanced filtration, purification systems, and ventilation improvements.
- **Q:** What energy‑focused features are part of HVAC work?
- **A:** Golden State Builders Group designs energy‑efficient HVAC systems with optimized airflow, load calculations, zoning plans, and smart thermostat integration.
